Name: UMovieSceneAudioSection
Description: Audio section, for use in the master audio, or by attached audio objects

Variables.Name: Sound
Variables.Description: The sound cue or wave that this section plays

Variables.Name: StartOffset
Variables.Description: The offset into the beginning of the audio clip

Variables.Name: AudioStartTime_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The absolute time that the sound starts playing at

Variables.Name: AudioDilationFactor_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The amount which this audio is time dilated by

Variables.Name: AudioVolume_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The volume the sound will be played with.

Variables.Name: SoundVolume
Variables.Description: The volume the sound will be played with.

Variables.Name: PitchMultiplier
Variables.Description: The pitch multiplier the sound will be played with.

Variables.Name: bOverrideAttenuation
Variables.Description: Should the attenuation settings on this section be used.

Variables.Name: OnQueueSubtitles
Variables.Description: Called when subtitles are sent to the SubtitleManager.  Set this delegate if you want to hijack the subtitles for other purposes

Variables.Name: OnAudioFinished
Variables.Description: called when we finish playing audio, either because it played to completion or because a Stop() call turned it off early
